title: Laundry Vouchers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Laundry Vouchers 13 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALBANY FIRST CHRISTIAN CHURCH ALBANY LAUNDRY LOVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers free laundry by covering machine fees and proving detergent at Queen & Hill Laundromat. 910 Queen Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 2nd and 4th Thursdays of the month 9am-12am Last load must be started by 11am Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY ACTION PROGRAM OF EAST CENTRAL OREGON MAIN OFFICE HELPING HAND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency financial assistance to address basic needs, including emergency lodging for up to three nights, prescription assistance for non-narcotic medications (twice per 12-month period), auto repairs up to $200 (once per 12-month period), laundry vouchers up to $10 per individual and $20 per family (twice per 12-month period), and rent payment or deposit assistance up to $300, but not more than 70% of one month's rent (once per 18-month period). 211 SE Byers Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: -Laundry vouchers: Unrestricted -Prescription assistance: Must have a written or phoned-in prescription from Walmart or Safeway -Rent assistance: Must be facing immediate eviction, potential homelessness, or experiencing homelessness -Lodging: Must be transitioning to permanent housing -Auto repairs: Must be in need of transportation to employment, medical appointment, or school Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-11:30am by appointment only (541) 276-3418 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH MCMINNVILLE COMMUNITY BREAKFAST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a breakfast, hygiene supplies, and clothing. Laundry cards may be available dependent upon funding. 125 SE Cowls Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Friday 9am-10am Email (503) 472-7941 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HELPING HANDS COALITION COMMUNITY SOCIAL HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides 2100 social services, nutritional hot meals, health behavior education, essential clothing, laundry and shower vouchers, temporary PO Box, and pet food, and resource navigation, tobacco, overdose, and suicide services. 4590 Florence Highway 101 N Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: People eligible under SNAP food assistance program Hours: Community Social Health Center: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 11am-1pm Hot meal: Monday/Wednesday/Friday noon-1pm Email (541) 997-5057 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ILLINOIS VALLEY FAMILY COALITION BASIC NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an emergency food pantry, clothing vouchers, laundry vouchers, shower vouchers, a hygiene closet, assistance with identification cards and birth certificates, and bus passes with transportation to job interviews. 535 E River Street Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 592-6139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides street outreach and individual case management for youth and young adults. Offers support, case management, and goal-setting tools to help identify and work towards future goals. Financial help and referrals to obtain interview clothes, laundry, obtain a birth certificate, Social Security card, ID, CPR/First Aid, or Food Handlers certification. Family mediation is available for families needing to work through a specific conflict. 225 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Ages 10-24. Individuals from outside the service area will not be turned away. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday by appointment Email (800) 901-2904 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES YOUTH SERVICE CENTER AND DROP IN OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop in center with street outreach and individual case management. Offers support, resources, referral help, and physical items. Case management and goal setting can be set up to help an individual name and work towards future goals. Family mediation is also available for families needing to work through a specific conflict. Financial help and referrals for youth needing to do laundry, obtain interview clothes, or obtain a birth certificate, Social Security card, ID, CPR/First Aid, or Food Handlers certification is also available. 1025 Pacific Boulevard SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Ages 10-24. Individuals from outside the service area will not be turned away. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday by appointment Email (800) 901-2904 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC NEWBERG GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people with local churches and service agencies. Basic goods and services are offered to clients as they are donated. Services available may include, but are not limited to: bicycles, breakfast/lunch bags, clothing closets (adults and children), community meals, counseling services, diapers, haircuts, H.U.G.S. (hats, umbrellas, gloves, scarves, and socks), kitchen supplies, laundry service, bedding/linens, personal grooming supplies/toiletries, over-the-counter medications, personal care kits, physical therapy, showers, water bill assistance, and firewood. Accepts donations of bedding and linen, clothing, and personal grooming supplies. 200 S College Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 537-3999 Get Directions Visit Website More Details POLK COUNTY RESOURCE CENTERS MONMOUTH RESOURCE CENTER RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a resource drop-in center with the following services: comprehensive information and referral, food boxes, a proof of homelessness document for a free Oregon identification card, prescription expense assistance, hygiene items, diapers, formula, transportation passes, and laundry passes. Assistance is based on available funding and is not guaranteed. 1407 Monmouth Independence Highway Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Unrestricted Transportation passes: Once per month for medical appointments, job interviews, or other appointments supported by documentation Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 751-1644 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SIUSLAW OUTREACH SERVICES SIUSLAW AREA RESOURCE CENTER COMMUNITY ASSISTANCE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of services including assistance with mortgage, electric, water and heating bills, prescriptions, shower and laundry vouchers, and transportation passes. Provides sleeping bags, tents, tarps, hats, gloves, and hand warmers during the winter season. All services are dependent on available funds. 1536 W 12th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-3:30pm, Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 997-2816 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST TIMOTHY'S EPISCOPAL CHURCH BASIC NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides public showers, laundry vouchers, and temporary mailing addresses. 401 Fir Street Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Low income households, and anyone who needs spiritual support Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 469-3314 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL THRIFT STORE AND FOOD PANTRY OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited emergency assistance with rent, utilities, laundry vouchers, and other forms of assistance. 501 NW 25th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Low-income households or houseless individuals Hours: Monday/Wednesday 1:30pm-3pm Email (541) 286-4183 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SUNNYSIDE SHOWER PROJECT SUNNYSIDE METHODIST CHRUCH SHOWERS AND HYGIENE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers showers, clothing, laundry cards, toiletries, and other supplies when available. Also serves as a resource center to help people connect with services like identification, housing, detox, and more. 3520 SE Yamhill Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-5pm, Saturday 2pm-6pm Email (971) 202-1721 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY FIRST CHRISTIAN CHURCH ALBANY LAUNDRY LOVE COMMUNITY ACTION PROGRAM OF EAST CENTRAL OREGON HELPING HAND FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH MCMINNVILLE COMMUNITY BREAKFAST HELPING HANDS COALITION COMMUNITY SOCIAL HEALTH PROGRAM ILLINOIS VALLEY FAMILY COALITION BASIC NEEDS JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES OUTREACH JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES OUTREACH LOVE INC NEWBERG GAP MINISTRIES POLK COUNTY RESOURCE CENTERS RESOURCE CENTER SIUSLAW OUTREACH SERVICES COMMUNITY ASSISTANCE SERVICES ST TIMOTHY'S EPISCOPAL CHURCH BASIC NEEDS ST VINCENT DE PAUL THRIFT STORE AND FOOD PANTRY OUTREACH SUNNYSIDE SHOWER PROJECT SHOWERS AND HYGIENE SERVICES
